_comment: Example test_env.json v2 — copy into <project>/.agent-toolkit/test_env.json and customize. NEVER commit real passwords. Use env-vars resolved by creds_resolver hook from <project>/.codex/mcp.local.env (which is gitignored). Related: probes auto_run default is FALSE after `migrate_probes_v2.py`; explicitly opt-in per probe by setting `auto_run: true` on entries you want PostToolUse-fired.
